issue.message: Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 26)

"settings_use_ngrok" is not translated in "cs" (Czech), "uk" (Ukrainian), "en" (English), "zh" (Chinese)
"settings_use_ngrok_desc" is not translated in "cs" (Czech), "uk" (Ukrainian), "en" (English), "zh" (Chinese)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_use_ngrok_desc">Connect via ngrok URL instead of local IP</string>

Prefer `mutableFloatStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`

issue.message: The resource `R.string.sources_found` appears to be unused
Use version catalog instead
Use version catalog instead
Use version catalog instead
Use version catalog instead
Use version catalog instead
Use version catalog instead
Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val dateFormatter = SimpleDateFormat("MMM d", Locale.getDefault())

issue.message: Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val fullFormatter = SimpleDateFormat("MMM d, HH:mm", Locale.getDefault())

issue.message: Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
